scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports GPA-policy notes for this school. Where the school does not publish a hard GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution, the panel says that directly instead of inventing a threshold.
policy_summary: Dartmouth does not publish a minimum GPA on the cited official admissions pages. Dartmouth says a top secondary school GPA can predict college success, but it evaluates grade trends and transcript context rather than using GPA alone as a cutoff.

what_mit_does_say.claim: Dartmouth does not publish a minimum GPA on the cited official admissions pages. Dartmouth says a top secondary school GPA can predict college success, but it evaluates grade trends and transcript context rather than using GPA alone as a cutoff.
